_about: READ-ONLY schema baseline for critical dispatch_state files. Consumed by tools/validate_state_schema.py to detect structural drift (missing required keys, wrong container shape). This file does NOT mutate live state; the live files are dict-of-entries (or a flat wrapper) iterated by readers, so we validate shape only. required_keys = the CORE keys readers depend on, NOT the full superset (lifecycle-only keys like delivered_at/picked_up_at are intentionally excluded to avoid false-positive drift on fresh entries). 2026-07-06: last_status_code ZDJĘTY z required dla courier_ground_truth — od 5b (geofence dostawy, vc60) wpis może się URODZIĆ z samym gps_arrived_at zanim istnieje jakikolwiek status (case 485853); pole stało się lifecycle-key, konsumenci czytają je przez .get() (courier_gps_commitment_shadow:93).
